desc: Channels 3 Frost at once — fills your slots in a single play, often overflowing without Capacitor.
Each Frost generated feeds Hailstorm's end-of-turn AoE condition reliably.
More Frost orbs from Ice Lance means more passive triggers from Loop each turn.
3 Frost channels = 3 more orbs for Barrage to count — significant damage increase.
Channels 2 Frost while gaining Block — exceptional double value per energy spent.
2-cost card triggers Helmet's +4 Block bonus — net 10 block for 2 energy.
Adds Frost to sustain Hailstorm's AoE condition every turn.
Channels 1 Dark — a growing damage threat sitting behind your Frost wall.
2-cost card triggers Helmet's +4 Block bonus every play.
Needs at least 1 Frost channeled to fire. More Frost = more reliable AoE each turn.
Focus increases Frost passive block, making the engine more durable while Hailstorm deals damage.
Each Focus point adds directly to Frost passive block (+1 per orb per turn).
More slots = more simultaneous Frost passives = more block per turn stacking up.
Loop triggers your rightmost Frost passive at turn start — free block before spending any energy.
Focus amplifies Dark Orb Evoke damage — crucial for boss-killing potential.
Loop on a Dark Orb grows its damage each turn for free — enables massive Evoke payoffs.
Permanently grants +1 Focus (+2 upgraded). The single most impactful Defect card for any Orb build.
Each Focus point adds 1 block per Frost passive — multiplies across all active slots.
Focus amplifies Dark Orb Evoke damage — transforms it from a slow threat to a win condition.
Adds 2 Orb Slots (+3 upgraded). Ice Lance stops overwriting itself — your channels stack instead.
More slots filled = significantly more damage from Barrage's per-orb calculation.
With 5 slots, Ice Lance's 3 Frost channels stack rather than evict existing orbs.
Free block every turn start without spending energy. The core passive value engine for Wall of Ice.
Grows Dark Orb damage every turn for free — enables massive Evoke payoffs against bosses.
Damage = 5 × channeled orbs. At 5 slots full: 25 damage for 1 energy — exceptional rate.
Frost orbs are your most common fill — Barrage converts passive defense into burst damage.
1 Frost + 1 card draw for 1 energy. Efficient and replaces itself — excellent card economy.
6 damage + 1 Frost for 1 energy. Cheap early game frost generation.
Glacier costs 2 — every play gives +4 Block from Helmet on top of Glacier's own 6 Block.
Shadow Shield costs 2 — Helmet fires every single time.
Starts every combat with 1 Focus — passive amplification from turn 1 without spending a card slot.
Focus from Data Disk means every Frost passive is worth more the moment combat begins.
+1 Strength boosts Sunder's damage slightly. Small but consistent across every fight.
Requires 3 attacks/turn. Ice Lance + Sunder cost 6 energy combined — rarely triggerable.
Same trigger problem as Shuriken. High-cost Frost attacks make 3-attack turns nearly impossible.
Loses 3 Focus permanently — devastates Frost passive block value for the rest of the run.
Focus loss directly reduces Frost passive block per orb. The 28 AoE is not worth the permanent tax.
Defragment spends a card and energy to build Focus; Hyperbeam destroys 3 of it in one play.
Tesla Coil needs Lightning; Hailstorm needs Frost. These pull the deck in opposite directions.
Tesla Coil's only real use — needs a full Lightning build to justify its slot.
